qwen_backed_extraction.note: Thirty-two validation charts covering 128 descriptive queries were extracted and schema-repaired using cached Qwen/Qwen3-VL-2B-Instruct.

full_evochartcode_gpu_evaluation.note: One hundred twenty-eight validation queries completed with image+code reasoning on CUDA.

transfer_datasets.note: Public Hugging Face samples were materialized for ChartQA, PlotQA, DVQA, and FigureQA.

proposal_scale_pipeline.note: Full ChartQA, PlotQA, DVQA, and FigureQA manifests are materialized. Qwen transfer, Qwen ablation, and Qwen multi-seed runners are implemented and smoke-tested. A validated source mutation candidate was promoted. Full Qwen evaluation jobs are checkpointed but not completed in this output set.
